projectDescription: A free, browser-based screenshot editor with beautiful backgrounds, device frames, 3D effects, animations, and video export — no signup, no watermarks.
keyFeatures: 100+ backgrounds — gradients, solid colors, mesh gradients, and images
Browser mockups — Safari & Chrome (light/dark) with realistic toolbars
Device frames — Arc browser, Polaroid, glass, outline, border styles
3D transforms — 30+ perspective presets with realistic depth
Draw & Markup — arrows, shapes, blur regions, text overlays
20+ animation presets with timeline editor and keyframe control
Video export — MP4, WebM, GIF with hardware-accelerated encoding
High-resolution PNG/JPG export up to 5x scale, fully in-browser
Chrome Extension for one-click screen recording
IndexedDB auto-save drafts — no data loss, works offline
publicApiSurface: POST /api/upload-url — generate presigned R2 upload URLs
POST /api/upload-video — direct video upload from Chrome extension
GET /api/image-proxy — proxy R2 images to avoid CORS
POST /api/export — server-side image export with FFmpeg
POST /api/cleanup-cache — clear cached images from R2
GET /api/tweet/[id] — fetch tweet data for snippet import
getInterpolatedProperties() — keyframe interpolation at a given time
clonePresetTracks() — apply animation preset with unique IDs
ANIMATION_PRESETS — 20+ presets across reveal, flip, perspective, orbit, depth
getBackgroundStyle(config: BackgroundConfig) — compute background CSS value
getBackgroundCSS(config: BackgroundConfig) — compute React.CSSProperties for background
